operations.rationale: Investment has a weaker effect on financial exposure due to improved vendor rates, reducing the risk from spending.

coaching.summary: The risk posed by investment to financial exposure has been reduced, reflecting successful vendor negotiations. This lowers the risk pathway from expansion spending to overall financial exposure.
